mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, customer_phone_snapshot, customer_name, member_id, member_level_snapshot, goods_amount, service_amount, delivery_fee, total_amount, need_delivery, delivery_address, delivery_lat, delivery_lng, delivery_distance, processed, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{customerPhoneSnapshot}, #{customerName}, #{memberId}, #{memberLevelSnapshot}, #{goodsAmount}, #{serviceAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{needDelivery}, #{deliveryAddress}, #{deliveryLat}, #{deliveryLng}, #{deliveryDistance}, #{processed}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, customer_phone_snapshot, customer_name, member_id, member_level_snapshot, goods_amount, service_amount, delivery_fee, total_amount, need_delivery, delivery_address, delivery_lat, delivery_lng, delivery_distance, processed, remark, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, customer_phone_snapshot, customer_name, member_id, member_level_snapshot, goods_amount, service_amount, delivery_fee, total_amount, need_delivery, delivery_address, delivery_lat, delivery_lng, delivery_distance, processed, remark, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET processed = #{processed} WHERE id = #{id}
